overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through urban streets at night. The scene transitions from a residential sidewalk alongside traffic, across an intersection with a waiting motorcyclist, to a commercial strip with distant downtown skyscrapers visible under clear night skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential sidewalk alongside multi-lane street

events.description: black sedan drives past on the left side of the street
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a white apartment building, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with illuminated windows running along the right side of the frame
tall street lamp casting warm orange light onto the sidewalk
traffic light suspended over the intersection showing red

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk at night, bordered by a white apartment building on the right. Street lamps cast a warm glow over the scene while cars pass by on the multi-lane street to the left. The camera approaches an intersection with visible traffic signals ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and corner commercial building

events.description: turning right to cross the street at the intersection
motorcyclist waiting at the corner comes into close view

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching a motorcyclist stopped at the corner intersection

notable_agents.action: motorcyclist wearing red and white helmet waiting at the corner on a sport bike

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with large illuminated windows at the street corner
white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt intersection, turning right toward a corner building with bright interior lighting. A motorcyclist waits at the corner wearing a distinctive helmet. The scene opens up from the enclosed sidewalk to the wider intersection space.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and distant downtown skyline

events.description: passing the motorcyclist and continuing along the new sidewalk
downtown skyline with tall skyscrapers becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial storefronts with illuminated windows while the downtown skyline emerges in the distance

entered.detail: commercial shop front with red awning and brightly lit display windows
gas station with distinctive green neon lighting and circular roof structure
cluster of tall illuminated skyscrapers visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts featuring awnings and illuminated interiors. The motorcyclist is left behind as the view opens up to reveal a distant downtown skyline with towering skyscrapers. A green-lit gas station becomes visible on the left as the character continues down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a residential urban neighborhood at night that gradually opens into a wide commercial strip with a distant city skyline. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside a white apartment building, moving past passing cars under the warm glow of street lamps toward a nearby intersection. As the character crosses the asphalt, the enclosed feeling of the sidewalk expands into the wider intersection space, passing a waiting motorcyclist near a brightly lit corner building. The scene then shifts toward a commercial stretch lined with illuminated storefronts and awnings, leaving the intersection behind. Finally, the view opens further to reveal towering downtown skyscrapers on the horizon and a green-lit gas station appearing on the left.
